---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new scanner, SDK capability, or improvement for Zenux
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

<!--
For larger changes (new scanners, contract changes, new SDK surface), please
open an issue to discuss the design before sending a pull request. See
CONTRIBUTING.md.
-->

## Problem / motivation

What problem are you trying to solve? What AI-native security gap or workflow
limitation does this address?

## Proposed solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. If this is a new
scanner or probe, note the threat it targets and how it stays within Zenux's
safety constraints (authorized-target validation, bounded requests, metadata-only
transmission).

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative solutions or features you considered.

## Additional context

Add any other context, references, or examples here.
